description:
Doc updatedness review for the gates feature (parent: bl-c97d).

Checklist:
- README.md has a sales-pitch section on gates: what they are, why they exist (post-dev audit workflows), and a worked example (impl task with security/docs/test gate children).
- SKILL.md task lifecycle diagram updated to show the gate-blocked close transition.
- 'bl link add' help text mentions 'gates' alongside relates_to/duplicates/supersedes/replies_to.
- 'bl close' error message when blocked by an open gate is human-readable and names the blocking child IDs.
- AGENTS.md (if present in repo) mentions gates as part of the post-review workflow.
- Version bump to 0.3.0 noted in any CHANGELOG or release notes.
title: Doc review: gates feature in README and SKILL
